S.FORM: Lou Amundson hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1982, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 12, Lou Amundson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Lou Amundson hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1982, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 12, Lou Amundson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: lou amun*s~ɕon ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ / pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, lou amun*s~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
